t_tag:
Where people and agents build in tune.
Tutti puts them in one live workspace: shared context, files, apps, and running tasks.
t_i1:
Currently supports Claude Code and Codex. More agents on the way
Once connected, use your agents right in Tutti.
No terminal needed, easy to start. Consistent experience across agents.
t_h2: See how agents collaborate with Big @
t_atdesc: Type @ in a conversation to let agents access each other's <bold>chats, files, and tasks</bold> with full context — or @ an app to put it to work.
t_atd1: @ another agent to share conversation context
t_atd2: @ a file for the agent to read directly
t_atd3: @ a task to give the agent task context
t_atd4: @ an app to let the agent use it
t_td1: You set the goal, agents do the rest. Then assign agents to break it into subtasks and pick the right one to execute.
t_td2: Agent messages, running status, errors — nothing slips through, no babysitting needed.
t_cd1: Proactive alerts · items that need your confirmation
t_cd2: Dashboard · filter by priority or agent
t_appdesc: Built-in productivity apps, ready to go. <info><bold>Powered by your existing subscriptions</bold> <dot>i</dot><tip>Available capabilities depend on your Agent / model subscriptions</tip></info>
t_agappdesc: Agents can @ apps directly in conversations, and use app outputs to keep working. <bold>No manual transfers.</bold>
t_agd1: Agent @ an app in conversation to get things done
t_agd2: Agent picks up app outputs and keeps working
t_end: People and agents, building in tune
